description: An auditor needs to verify that a specific aircraft is in compliance with a new FAA airworthiness directive.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific AD number and the aircraft tail number to be audited.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the AD and aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Search the aircraft's maintenance records for a logbook entry showing that the work required by the AD has been completed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a signed-off work order that references the specific AD.

nodes.task_description: Record the finding that the aircraft is in compliance with the AD in the audit report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the audit report with a 'compliant' status.
